# Step 5: Generate — Write Artifacts

## Your Task

For each selected candidate: generate the full artifact content, ask where to save it (`l` local / `g` global), then write the file. Process one artifact at a time in the order the user selected them.

---

## Per-Artifact Loop

For each selected candidate, do the following in sequence:

### 1. Show full artifact preview

Generate the complete file content using the template for its type (see templates below). Display it in a code block.

### 2. Ask destination

```
Save "{artifact-name}" to:
  [l]  local   — ./.claude/{type}/{name}
  [g]  global  — ~/.claude/{type}/{name}
  [s]  skip

Enter l, g, or s:
```

**HALT — wait for input before writing.**

### 3. Write the file

Write to the resolved path. If the file already exists, show:
```
⚠️  {path} already exists.  [o] overwrite  [s] skip
```
**HALT — wait.**

Confirm each write:
```
✓  Written: ./.claude/skills/bmad-epic-bootstrap/SKILL.md
```

---

## Artifact Templates

### Skill → `{dest}/skills/{name}/SKILL.md`

```markdown
---
name: {kebab-name}
description: {One sentence trigger condition derived from mind.md patterns}
---

# {Title}

{2–3 sentences grounded in what mind.md shows about this recurring workflow}

## When to Use
{Specific triggers derived from when the pattern appears in Active Work / Journey}

## Approach
{Steps extracted from the mind.md narrative}

## Key Patterns
{Concrete do's and don'ts from Lessons Learned}

---
*Generated by mind-evolve from mind.md — section: {source sections}*
```

### Rule → `{dest}/rules/{name}.md`

```markdown
# {Rule Title}

{What the rule is in one sentence}

## Standard
{The constraint, derived from Key Decisions or Lessons Learned}

## Why
{Rationale from the mind.md quote}

---
*Generated by mind-evolve from mind.md — section: {source sections}*
```

### Hook → merge into `{dest}/settings.json` hooks array

```json
{
  "PostToolUse": [{
    "matcher": "{triggering tool}",
    "hooks": [{
      "type": "command",
      "command": "{command derived from the ✗ lesson or key decision}"
    }]
  }]
}
```

Read existing `settings.json`, merge the new hook, write back. Never overwrite existing hooks.

### Agent → `{dest}/agents/{name}.md`

```markdown
---
name: {kebab-name}
description: Use when {triggers from mind.md Active Work / Journey patterns}
tools: ["Read", "Grep", "Glob", "Bash"]
model: sonnet
---

# {Agent Title}

{Role based on the observed complex workflow in mind.md}

## Workflow
{Steps derived from the mind.md narrative}

---
*Generated by mind-evolve from mind.md — section: {source sections}*
```

### Command → `{dest}/commands/{name}.md`

```markdown
---
description: {What this shortcut does — from repeated pattern in mind.md}
---

# /{command-name}

Replaces the recurring task: "{the exact or paraphrased pattern from mind.md}"

## What It Does
{Steps Claude follows, derived from Active Work / Journey narrative}

---
*Generated by mind-evolve from mind.md — section: {source sections}*
```

---

After all artifacts are written, load `./step-06-docs.md`.
